data.content:
All tests passed. Here's the command used:

```
dotnet test --blame-crash
```

This project uses **Microsoft.Testing.Platform** (MTP) via `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport`. The `--blame-crash` flag enables crash dump collection — if any test crashes the host process, a dump file will be automatically captured in the test results directory for post-mortem debugging.
